features_page.title: Features
features_page.meta_description: Every module shipped in Project NEXUS v1.5, with honest maturity labels for federation, timebanking, marketplace, community tools, safety, analytics, and open-source infrastructure.
features_page.heading: What Project NEXUS does
features_page.subheading: Project NEXUS is an enterprise-grade, multi-tenant community platform. Every module below ships in v1.5 today. We label modules honestly: unmarked items are Generally Available; newer or actively-hardening surfaces carry a Beta or Preview chip.
features_page.maturity_ga: Generally Available - stable, supported, used in production across pilot tenants.
features_page.maturity_beta: Working in production today, but the public surface or wire protocol is still being hardened.
features_page.maturity_preview: Recently shipped and available to opt in. Expect rapid iteration - the API and UX may change.
features_page.open_source_body: Project NEXUS is fully open source under AGPL-3.0. Every line of code is auditable, forkable, and self-hostable. Federation protocols are documented as open standards so no single platform controls the global timebanking network.
features_page.security_body_before: Found a security issue? Please report it privately to
features_page.security_body_after: rather than filing a public issue. Full vulnerability-disclosure policy in SECURITY.md on the source repository.

timebanking_engine.title: Timebanking Engine
timebanking_engine.description: Full credit exchange system with wallet, transactions, and broker controls.

multi_tenancy.title: Multi-Tenancy
multi_tenancy.description: Host unlimited communities on a single platform, each with their own branding, configuration, and feature set.

tenant_hierarchy.title: Tenant Hierarchy
tenant_hierarchy.description: Parent–child tenant relationships with feature toggling and federation scoping.

smart_matching.title: Smart Matching
smart_matching.description: AI-powered matching with semantic embeddings, collaborative filtering, availability scheduling, and learned preferences.

real_time_messaging.title: Real-Time Messaging
real_time_messaging.description: Private conversations with Pusher WebSocket integration and real-time presence.

progressive_web_app.title: Progressive Web App
progressive_web_app.description: Install as a PWA on any device — offline shell, push notifications, NetworkFirst update flow.

native_mobile_app.title: Native Mobile App
native_mobile_app.description: iOS and Android builds from the same React codebase via Capacitor.
native_mobile_app.note: Web is the primary distribution channel; native builds are tested but not yet under continuous release.

federation.title: Federation
federation.intro: A four-protocol federation layer for cross-community exchange — Nexus (native), Komunitin (15 endpoints), Credit Commons Protocol (11 endpoints, CEN-compatible), and TimeOverflow.

federation_network.title: Federation Network
federation_network.description: Connect multiple NEXUS communities into a network for cross-community discovery, listings, events, and messaging.

external_partner_federation.title: External Partner Federation
external_partner_federation.description: Live with external timebanking platforms — partnerships established, messages flowing, credit exchange under active testing.
external_partner_federation.note: Real partnerships exist and exchange data daily. The wire protocols are still being hardened against edge cases — treat external credit transfers as supervised, not automated.

multi_protocol_adapters.title: Multi-Protocol Adapters
multi_protocol_adapters.description: Two-way sync across 9 entity types: members, listings, events, groups, connections, volunteering, reviews, transfers, messages.

federation_neighborhoods.title: Federation Neighborhoods
federation_neighborhoods.description: Geographically grouped clusters of federated communities for regional coordination.

credit_agreements.title: Credit Agreements
credit_agreements.description: Negotiated exchange-rate terms between federated communities.

federation_analytics.title: Federation Analytics
federation_analytics.description: Live admin dashboards for partner activity, sync health, and federated transaction volume.

service_listings.title: Service Listings
service_listings.description: Post offers and requests, browse and smart-match listings.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Standalone classifieds module with Stripe Connect payouts, orders, seller profiles, and AI-powered reply suggestions.

donations.title: Donations
donations.description: One-off and recurring donations via Stripe with full dashboards and receipts for organisations.

identity_verification.title: Identity Verification
identity_verification.description: Optional Stripe Identity flow (document + selfie + name/DOB matching) with a verified-member badge.

exchange_workflow.title: Exchange Workflow
exchange_workflow.description: Structured service-exchange lifecycle with broker approval and dispute handling.

group_exchanges.title: Group Exchanges
group_exchanges.description: Bulk community service exchanges across multiple members.

social_feed.title: Social Feed
social_feed.description: Posts, comments, likes, polls, hashtags, voice messages, media attachments, link previews, and @mentions.

stories.title: Stories
stories.description: Ephemeral 24-hour photo and video stories with reactions, polls, and highlights.

presence_system.title: Presence System
presence_system.description: Real-time online/offline status with privacy controls and custom status messages.

events_and_groups.title: Events & Groups
events_and_groups.description: Community gatherings, interest-based groups, and event reminders.

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Follow and connect with other community members.

members_directory.title: Members Directory
members_directory.description: Browse, filter, and discover people in your community.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.description: Verification badges, journeys, XP, leaderboards, achievements, challenges, streaks, XP shop rewards, community dashboard, and seasonal competitions.

goals_and_impact.title: Goals & Impact
goals_and_impact.description: Track personal goals and community impact with mentoring and deliverables tracking.

ideation_challenges.title: Ideation Challenges
ideation_challenges.description: Innovation hub with campaigns, ideas, voting, and outcomes tracking.

volunteering.title: Volunteering
volunteering.description: Volunteer opportunities, hours tracking, check-ins, expenses, certificates, wellbeing monitoring, emergency alerts, and a volunteer-organisation wallet that pays out time credits on approved hours.

job_vacancies.title: Job Vacancies
job_vacancies.description: Full recruitment module with alerts, analytics, and a public RSS/JSON job feed for aggregators.

organisations.title: Organisations
organisations.description: Company and employer profiles with sub-accounts and a dedicated organisation wallet.

sub_accounts_family_accounts.title: Sub-Accounts / Family Accounts
sub_accounts_family_accounts.description: Parent–child account relationships for household and family management.

reviews_and_ratings.title: Reviews & Ratings
reviews_and_ratings.description: Build trust through structured member feedback.

polls.title: Polls
polls.description: Community voting and surveys with multiple question types.

skills_browse.title: Skills Browse
skills_browse.description: Explore the skill taxonomy and discover expertise.

availability_scheduling.title: Availability Scheduling
availability_scheduling.description: Timezone-aware time-slot scheduling for smart matching and bookings.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Tenant-managed content management and community news.

resources_and_knowledge_base.title: Resources & Knowledge Base
resources_and_knowledge_base.description: Structured articles and a shared resource library.

custom_pages.title: Custom Pages
custom_pages.description: Tenant-managed CMS pages for community content.

newsletter_system.title: Newsletter System
newsletter_system.description: Email campaign manager with A/B testing, smart segments, geo targeting, recurring sends, templates, send-time optimisation, and full open/click analytics.

legal_hub.title: Legal Hub
legal_hub.description: Versioned legal documents with acceptance gates and audit trail.

impact_reports.title: Impact Reports
impact_reports.description: SROI analysis, member outcome reports, and social impact case studies.

social_prescribing.title: Social Prescribing
social_prescribing.description: Information and tooling for community health integration workflows.

member_verification_badges.title: Member Verification Badges
member_verification_badges.description: Verified status indicators on member profiles.

streaks.title: Streaks
streaks.description: Consecutive activity tracking to reward consistent engagement.

personal_insights_dashboard.title: Personal Insights Dashboard
personal_insights_dashboard.description: Individual engagement metrics, hours given/received, skills breakdown, monthly charts, and personalised recommendations.

safeguarding_module.title: Safeguarding Module
safeguarding_module.description: Flagged content review workflow, incident reporting, safeguarding assignment tracking, and a community safety dashboard.

crm.title: CRM
crm.description: Admin contact management with notes, tasks, tags, activity timelines, and export.

semantic_search.title: Semantic Search
semantic_search.description: Meilisearch-powered full-text search across listings, members, events, and groups with typo tolerance, synonyms, and per-tenant isolation.

collaborative_filtering.title: Collaborative Filtering
collaborative_filtering.description: Item-based recommendations from real community interaction data.

semantic_embeddings.title: Semantic Embeddings
semantic_embeddings.description: OpenAI-powered content matching for listings, members, and requests.

edgerank_feed.title: EdgeRank Feed
edgerank_feed.description: Time-decay, affinity, and engagement-weighted feed ranking.

matchrank_and_communityrank.title: MatchRank & CommunityRank
matchrank_and_communityrank.description: Bayesian quality scoring with Wilson confidence intervals.

match_learning.title: Match Learning
match_learning.description: Feedback loop that improves recommendations from user interactions.

algorithm_health_dashboard.title: Algorithm Health Dashboard
algorithm_health_dashboard.description: Live admin monitoring and tuning of all ranking systems.

caring_community_layer.title: Caring Community Layer
caring_community_layer.intro: A pilot-readiness governance layer for civic and caring-community deployments — most modules shipped April–May 2026.

civic_digest.title: Civic Digest
civic_digest.description: Periodic summary of community activity and outcomes for stakeholders.

success_stories.title: Success Stories
success_stories.description: Curated case studies of member-led outcomes.

feedback_inbox.title: Feedback Inbox
feedback_inbox.description: Centralised pilot-feedback capture with admin triage.

integration_showcase.title: Integration Showcase
integration_showcase.description: Public surface for connected partners and integrations.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.description: In-context AI helper for community administrators.

enterprise_security.title: Enterprise Security
enterprise_security.description: CSRF, rate limiting, TOTP 2FA, WebAuthn passkeys, CSP nonces, a CORS allowlist, Form Request validation, email verification gates, and invite-code registration.

stripe_payments_layer.title: Stripe Payments Layer
stripe_payments_layer.description: Subscriptions, donations, marketplace (Connect), and identity verification, with idempotent webhook handling and deep money-flow test coverage.

gdpr_compliance_suite.title: GDPR Compliance Suite
gdpr_compliance_suite.description: Data requests, consent management, cookie consent, breach tracking, and a full audit log.

fraud_and_abuse_detection.title: Fraud & Abuse Detection
fraud_and_abuse_detection.description: Automated suspicious-activity alerts and content moderation.

enterprise_rbac.title: Enterprise RBAC
enterprise_rbac.description: Role-based access control across 13+ modules with a full permission matrix.

wcag_2_1_aa_accessibility.title: WCAG 2.1 AA Accessibility
wcag_2_1_aa_accessibility.description: Audited accessibility compliance across the user-facing surface.

multi_language_support.title: Multi-Language Support
multi_language_support.description: 11 languages: English, Irish, German, French, Italian, Portuguese, Spanish, Dutch, Polish, Japanese, and Arabic (full RTL).

self_hosted_prerendering.title: Self-Hosted Prerendering
self_hosted_prerendering.description: Bot-only Playwright snapshots served to SEO crawlers; users always get the live SPA.

guided_onboarding.title: Guided Onboarding
guided_onboarding.description: Wizard for new members with smart defaults.

admin_panel.title: Admin Panel
admin_panel.description: Algorithm controls, diagnostics, cron-job monitoring, and email-deliverability monitoring.

email_webhook_processing.title: Email Webhook Processing
email_webhook_processing.description: SendGrid bounce, complaint, and delivery event handling.

500plus_phpunit_tests.title: 500+ PHPUnit Tests
500plus_phpunit_tests.description: Money flow, webhooks, federation, groups, marketplace — plus Vitest frontend suites.

openapi_3_0_specification.title: OpenAPI 3.0 Specification
openapi_3_0_specification.description: Full API spec with Swagger UI docs.

fully_dockerized.title: Fully Dockerized
fully_dockerized.description: Production and development run from the same Docker Compose foundations.

faq.meta_description: Common questions about timebanking, time credits, listings, exchanges, trust and safety, and community membership — everything you need to get started.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle_before_link: Can't find what you're looking for? Visit our
faq.no_results: No matching questions found. Try a different search term.
faq.cta_description: Our support team is here to help.

q1.question: What is time banking?
q1.answer_p1: Time banking is a community exchange system where one hour of help equals one time credit, regardless of the service provided. Whether you're teaching a language, helping with gardening, or providing tech support, your time is valued equally.
q1.answer_p2: It's a way to build community connections while exchanging skills and services without traditional money.

q2.question: Is it free to join?
q2.answer_p1: Yes! Membership is completely free. The only currency used is time credits, which you earn by helping others in the community.
q2.answer_p2: New members often receive a small number of starter credits to help them get started.

q3.question: How do I get started?
q3.step1_text: Add a photo, bio, and your skills
q3.step2_text: See what services are offered and needed
q3.step3_text: Share what you can help others with

q4.question: What skills can I offer?
q4.answer_outro: Everyone has something valuable to offer!

q1.question: What is a time credit?
q1.answer_p1: One time credit equals one hour of service. It's the currency of our community.
q1.answer_p2: You can also exchange partial hours: 30 minutes = 0.5 credits, 15 minutes = 0.25 credits.

q2.question: How do I earn time credits?

q3.question: Can I donate my credits?
q3.option1: Transfer credits to any other member
q3.option2: Donate to the community pot (helps members who need extra support)

q4.question: Can my balance go negative?
q4.answer: Some communities allow limited negative balances to help new members get started before they've had a chance to earn credits. Check with your community coordinator for the specific rules in your timebank.

q5.question: What if I sent credits to the wrong person?
q5.answer_intro: Transactions cannot be automatically reversed. If you made a mistake:
q5.step1: Contact the recipient and ask them to send the credits back
q5.step2: If you can't resolve it, contact support for assistance
q5.answer_outro: Always double-check the recipient before confirming a transfer.

q1.question: How do I arrange an exchange?
q1.step1: Find an offer or request that interests you
q1.step2: Message the member to discuss details
q1.step3: Agree on when, where, and estimated time
q1.step5: The person who received help sends time credits
q1.step6: Leave a review for each other

q2.question: Is it safe to meet strangers?
q2.tip1: Meet in public places for first exchanges
q2.tip2: Check the member's profile and reviews
q2.tip4: Trust your instincts — if something feels wrong, leave
q2.answer_outro: Report any concerning behaviour to our support team.

q3.question: What if someone doesn't show up or complete the service?
q3.answer_intro: Communication is key. If there's an issue:
q3.step1: Message the member to discuss what happened
q3.step2: Try to find a resolution together
q3.step3: If you can't resolve it, contact support
q3.answer_outro: Repeated no-shows or poor behaviour may result in account restrictions.

q4.question: Are the services insured?
q4.answer: Exchanges are informal arrangements between community members. We don't provide insurance coverage for services. For higher-risk activities, discuss liability with the other member beforehand. Some members have their own professional insurance.

q1.question: What are badges and XP?
q1.answer_intro: Our gamification system rewards community participation:
q1.item1_text: Earned for various activities, helping you level up
q1.item2_text: Achievements for reaching milestones (60+ to collect!)
q1.item3_text: Progress from Newcomer to Timebank Legend

q2.question: How do I earn XP?
q2.answer_intro: You earn XP for many activities:

q3.question: Can I opt out of leaderboards?
q3.answer_before_link: Yes! If you prefer privacy, you can opt out of appearing on public leaderboards in your
q3.answer_after_link: . You'll still earn XP and badges, they just won't be visible to others on the rankings.

q1.question: How do I change my password?
q1.answer_after_link: > Security to change your password. You'll need to enter your current password first. If you've forgotten your password, use the "Forgot Password" link on the login page.

q2.question: Who can see my profile?
q2.answer_intro: By default, your profile is visible to other community members. You can control:

q3.question: How do I delete my account?
q3.answer_intro: If you wish to leave the community:
q3.answer_outro: Note: Your transaction history will be retained for record-keeping, but your personal information will be removed.

q4.question: How is my data protected?
q4.item1: Your data is encrypted and securely stored
q4.item3: You can request a copy of your data at any time
q4.item4: We comply with GDPR and data protection regulations

maintenance.title: We'll be back soon!
maintenance.description: is currently undergoing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience.
maintenance.apology: We apologize for any inconvenience. Please check back in a little while.
maintenance.deploy_notice: This platform is still being actively built, so there may be phases of rapid deployments. During these times, the server automatically enters maintenance mode. This normally only lasts about five minutes while new changes are being applied.
